Localization.Description: Lateral movement using Cobalt Strike's PSexec is detected

EventDescriptions.EventDescription: Creation of the service {object.name} with the Cobalt Strike-specific path {object.path} is detected on host {event_src.host}
The user {subject.account.name} used lateral movement from host {src.ip} to host {event_src.host} with the Cobalt Strike's PSexec utility. Service created: {object.name}.
